name: Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well in a bowl until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into small balls (about dime-sized).
3. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, or until they are golden brown and firm to the touch.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
